# Packages for the shell + terminal domain on Fedora.
# Consume with: xargs -a deps/packages.dnf.txt sudo dnf install -y

fish
kitty
starship
carapace
fastfetch
fzf
eza
bat
zoxide

# Notes:
# - atuin is NOT in Fedora official repos. Install via:
#     sudo dnf install cargo
#     cargo install atuin
#   Or grab a prebuilt binary from
#   https://github.com/atuinsh/atuin/releases
# - fisher (fish plugin manager) is a fish plugin, install AFTER fish:
#     fish -c 'curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jorgebucaran/fisher/main/functions/fisher.fish | source && fisher install jorgebucaran/fisher'
